description: Send a warning alert message via the agent (covers POST /api/messages path, symmetric to create-channel)

turns.user: Send a warning-severity alert message titled 'Manual test' with body 'verifying the message delivery path'. Use category alert.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent calls `neomind message send` (or POST /api/messages) with severity=warning, category=alert
expectations.overall: Message should land in the message center; agent should not just echo text without dispatching
